subject: 電力
statement: 有効電力 P=300kW の負荷の力率を 0.6（遅れ）から 0.8 に改善したい。必要な進相コンデンサの容量 Qc〔kvar〕は?
figure: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 280 150" role="img" aria-label="電力三角形: 進相容量Qc=175kvarで無効電力を低減（力率改善）" font-family="system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13"><title>電力三角形: 進相容量Qc=175kvarで無効電力を低減（力率改善）</title><g stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="45" y1="120" x2="157.5" y2="120"/><polygon points="157.5,120 149.4,123.9 149.4,116.1" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><text x="165.5" y="132" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">P=300</text><line x1="45" y1="120" x2="45" y2="-30" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/><line x1="157.5" y1="120" x2="157.5" y2="-30" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/><line x1="45" y1="-30" x2="157.5" y2="-30" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/><line x1="45" y1="120" x2="157.5" y2="-30"/><polygon points="157.5,-30 155.8,-21.2 149.5,-25.9" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><text x="162.3" y="-40.4" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">S(前)</text><line x1="45" y1="120" x2="157.5" y2="35.62500000000003"/><polygon points="157.5,35.62500000000003 153.4,43.6 148.7,37.4" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><text x="163.9" y="26.82500000000003" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">S(後)</text><line x1="143.5" y1="-30" x2="143.5" y2="35.62500000000003"/><polygon points="143.5,35.62500000000003 139.6,27.5 147.4,27.5" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><text x="147.5" y="2.812500000000014" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">Qc=175</text></g></svg>
solution: 着眼点: 有効電力Pは一定で、無効電力QをQ1→Q2へ減らす差が必要容量。
ポイント: 図の電力三角形で、Sの傾き(力率)が立つほどQが減りQcは増える。
